all.en: Dear Mr. Patel, thank you for contacting the IT helpdesk this morning.
all.zh: 親愛的 Patel 先生，感謝您今天早上聯繫 IT 服務台。

all.en: Your ticket number is HD-48721 and has been assigned to engineer Mia.
all.zh: 您的工單編號為 HD-48721，已指派給工程師 Mia。

all.en: We understand that your laptop cannot connect to the corporate VPN.
all.zh: 我們了解您的筆電無法連線至公司 VPN。

all.en: Based on the logs, the certificate on your device expired last weekend.
all.zh: 根據日誌，您裝置上的憑證已於上週末到期。

all.en: Please restart the laptop and open the Software Center application.
all.zh: 請重啟筆電並開啟 Software Center 應用程式。

all.en: Search for the package named VPN Certificate Renewal 2026.
all.zh: 搜尋名稱為 VPN Certificate Renewal 2026 的套件。

all.en: Click Install and wait until the status changes to Completed.
all.zh: 點擊安裝並等候狀態變為已完成。

all.en: After installation, sign out of Windows and sign back in once.
all.zh: 安裝完成後，請登出 Windows 並重新登入一次。

all.en: Open the VPN client and select the Asia gateway from the list.
all.zh: 開啟 VPN 用戶端並從清單中選擇亞洲閘道。

all.en: Enter your employee ID and the new password issued last Friday.
all.zh: 輸入您的員工編號及上週五核發的新密碼。

all.en: If the connection still fails, please capture a screenshot of the error.
all.zh: 若連線仍失敗，請擷取錯誤訊息的螢幕截圖。

all.en: Send the screenshot to helpdesk at acmecorp dot com.
all.zh: 請將截圖寄到 helpdesk at acmecorp dot com。

all.en: Include the time of the failure and the gateway you tried.
all.zh: 請附上失敗時間以及您嘗試使用的閘道。

all.en: Our team monitors the inbox between seven and twenty hundred hours daily.
all.zh: 我們團隊每天於 07:00 至 20:00 監看信箱。

all.en: For urgent issues, you may also call extension 8800 directly.
all.zh: 如為緊急問題，您亦可直接撥打分機 8800。

all.en: Please note that password resets require manager approval in writing.
all.zh: 請注意，密碼重設需主管書面核准。

all.en: We cannot share credentials over the phone for security reasons.
all.zh: 基於安全考量，我們無法透過電話告知帳密。

all.en: A satisfaction survey will be emailed when the ticket is closed.
all.zh: 工單關閉時將寄送滿意度調查至您信箱。

all.en: Your feedback helps us improve response time and service quality.
all.zh: 您的回饋有助我們改善回應時間與服務品質。

all.en: We aim to resolve standard tickets within one business day.
all.zh: 我們的目標是於一個工作日內解決標準工單。

all.en: Complex hardware cases may require up to three working days.
all.zh: 複雜的硬體案件可能需要至多三個工作天。

all.en: Thank you for your patience while we investigate this matter.
all.zh: 感謝您耐心等候我們調查此事。

all.en: Best regards, the Global IT Helpdesk Team at headquarters.
all.zh: 敬祝順心，總部全球 IT 服務台團隊敬上。

all.en: P S, please keep this ticket number handy when contacting us again.
all.zh: 附註：再次聯繫我們時請備妥此工單編號。

all.en: Our knowledge base contains step by step articles for common VPN issues.
all.zh: 我們的知識庫收錄常見 VPN 問題的逐步解說文章。

all.en: You may access the portal at support dot acmecorp dot com using single sign on.
all.zh: 您可使用單一登入連線至 support dot acmecorp dot com 入口網站。

all.en: Self service password reset is available there for non privileged accounts.
all.zh: 該入口提供非特權帳號的自助密碼重設功能。

all.en: If you travel internationally, please notify us at least three days in advance.
all.zh: 若您將出差至海外，請至少提前三天通知我們。

all.en: We can pre approve alternative gateways for smoother connectivity abroad.
all.zh: 我們可預先核准替代閘道，以利您海外連線更順暢。

all.en: Please also ensure your operating system patches are fully up to date.
all.zh: 也請確認您的作業系統修補程式皆已更新至最新版本。

all.en: Outdated patches can prevent the VPN client from establishing a session.
all.zh: 過舊的修補程式可能導致 VPN 用戶端無法建立連線工作階段。

all.en: We appreciate your cooperation in keeping company devices secure and current.
all.zh: 感謝您配合確保公司裝置維持安全且最新狀態。

all.en: Please reply to this email if you need further assistance from our team.
all.zh: 若您需要我們團隊進一步協助，請直接回覆此封郵件。
